overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a foggy, overgrown park. The atmosphere is tense and atmospheric with heavy fog obscuring visibility, leading up to a gated entrance labeled 'Rosewater Park'.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown garden path with tall hedges

tall black vintage-style street lamp visible through the fog
large circular stone planter with vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow, foggy garden path flanked by tall overgrown hedges on both sides. A vintage lamppost is visible ahead through the mist, and the atmosphere is quiet and isolated.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path with park benches and stone walls

events.description: park benches come into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing wooden park benches on the left

old stone wall covered in vines and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The path continues with wooden benches appearing on the left side. An old stone retaining wall becomes visible on the right, covered in creeping vines, as the character approaches a stairway in the distance.

events.description: a woman in a red jacket appears walking alongside on the left

agents.ego_description: walking forward as a woman in a red leather jacket briefly appears and walks alongside on the left

notable_agents.action: woman in red jacket walking alongside the main character briefly before stopping

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the stairs, a woman in a red leather jacket briefly appears on the left and walks alongside him for a moment before the scene transitions. The path remains enclosed by hedges and stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to park entrance gate

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase
park entrance gate with 'Rosewater Park' sign becomes visible at top of stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the park entrance gate

black metal park entrance gate with 'Rosewater Park' signage
ornate stone railing with decorative posts along the left side of stairs
ornate stone railing with decorative posts along the right side of stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by ornate balustrades. The tall hedges give way to open sky as he climbs toward the park entrance, where a black metal gate with 'Rosewater Park' signage emerges from the fog at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, foggy garden path that gradually opens up toward a formal park entrance. It begins with the character walking between tall, overgrown hedges under the dim glow of a distant vintage lamppost. As the path progresses, the enclosure shifts to include wooden benches on the left and a vine-covered stone retaining wall on the right, just as a woman in a red leather jacket briefly appears and walks alongside him. The scene then transitions toward a wide stone staircase with ornate balustrades, where the oppressive hedges finally give way to the open sky. The climb concludes as the camera ascends the stairs to reveal a black metal gate labeled Rosewater Park emerging from the mist.
